payload.text_excerpt: The Ariete Steam Iron AR-6234 stands out as a high-performance yet user-friendly
payload.text:
The Ariete Steam Iron AR-6234 stands out as a high-performance yet user-friendly appliance, meticulously designed for everyday ironing needs. With a potent 2000W power, it ensures rapid heat-up and efficient wrinkle elimination, supported by a continuous steam emission of 28 gr/min and a powerful steam shot of 140 gr/min for stubborn creases. The ergonomic soft-touch handle and lightweight, reduced size construction enhance user comfort and maneuverability, while the horizontal filling design simplifies the water refill process.

This model is equipped with a non-stick Teflon soleplate, measuring 21.5x11.5 cm, which guarantees a smooth glide across all fabric types, protecting garments and ensuring even heat distribution. Core functionalities include dry and steam ironing, precise steam adjustment, vertical steam for delicate or hanging items, and a spray function for dampening fabrics. Furthermore, the AR-6234 incorporates an auto-clean system for hassle-free maintenance and an anti-drip function to prevent water spots, making it a reliable and brilliant tool for maintaining pristine clothing. The intense blue color adds a touch of modern aesthetics to its practical design.

payload.text:
- Powerful 2000W for quick heat-up and efficient wrinkle removal.
- Non-stick Teflon soleplate (21.5x11.5 cm) ensures smooth gliding and fabric protection.
- Lightweight design and ergonomic soft-touch handle for comfortable, effortless handling.
- Versatile ironing with dry/steam function, vertical steam, spray function, and powerful 140 gr/min steam shot.
- Integrated auto-clean function and anti-drip system for prolonged performance and spotless results.

payload.text_excerpt: The Ariete AR-6234 Steam Iron is engineered for exceptional ease of use and effi
payload.text:
The Ariete AR-6234 Steam Iron is engineered for exceptional ease of use and efficient ironing, making it an ideal choice for daily garment care. Boasting a robust 2000W power output, this iron delivers a powerful steam shot of 140 gr/min and a continuous steam emission of 28 gr/min, ensuring deep penetration into fabrics for quick wrinkle removal. Its lightweight and compact design, combined with an ergonomic soft-touch handle and horizontal filling system, provide a comfortable and straightforward ironing experience.

Equipped with a durable non-stick Teflon soleplate measuring 21.5x11.5 cm, the AR-6234 glides effortlessly over various fabrics, preventing snags and ensuring smooth results. Essential functions like dry/steam ironing, vertical steam for hanging garments, and precise steam adjustment offer versatility for all fabric types. The integrated auto-clean function, anti-drip system, and spray function enhance the iron's longevity and performance, preventing limescale build-up, water stains, and aiding in dampening fabrics. This model also includes a convenient 50 ml measuring cup for easy tank refills.
